title: Cold-Chain Causal Cartographer
strategies: learn nothing: predict the empty graph; reproduces the evaluator's empty-graph SHD reference (~0.1)

marginal-association thresholding: draw a link wherever pairwise mutual information exceeds a threshold and orient by (uninformative) index order -- keeps spurious transitive links and reverses ~half the edges

constraint-based PC-style discovery: MI skeleton, order-1 conditional-independence pruning to kill transitive links, then v-structure/collider orientation with light Meek propagation and a deterministic tiebreak -- strong skeleton plus partial orientation drives SHD well below the empty-graph baseline
stronger structure learning: higher-order CI tests, score-based search (BIC/BDeu hill-climbing over DAGs), or bootstrap-averaged CPDAG estimation with full Meek orientation
